data.content: Plan reviewed. Approach is sound — canonicalize at write boundary, persist canonical form to settings.toml, all reads pure. Reusing existing atomic write primitives (saveSettings) for migration. Tests: extend settings-load.test.ts with explicit auto-migration scenario (legacy entry detection + persist-back roundtrip + idempotency check). No security/perf/maintainability concerns. Invariants respected: hermetic (mocked fs), fail-loud preserved (no silent fallbacks), descriptor-driven workflow respected.
